name: Night in the Woods
description: NIGHT IN THE WOODS is an adventure game focused on exploration, story, and character, featuring dozens of characters to meet and lots to do across a lush, vibrant world.
requirements:
Minimum:
  • OS *: Windows 7
  • Processor: Intel i5 Quad-Core
  • Memory: 4 GB RAM
  • Graphics: Intel HD 4000
  • Storage: 8 GB available space
  • Additional Notes: 32-bit systems must use virtual memory to get over 2GB.
comment1: Honestly if you really pay attention to the dialogue you feel a connection to the world that makes you understand that this is literally someones life right now and that kinda give it its charm in a way.
comment2: gods i dont even really know where to start about this game, i came across it recently when finding a playthrough of Jacksepticeyes to watch, and it started as me just thinking it was a funny game, then turned into having the playlist on loop every night, and i know for a fact i havent played it 100% through, i've never sat down and thought about a game like this before, but after making it to the epilogue i sat down and sent a long ass paragragh to my best friend, and im not usually a very sentimental guy, i feel like the gang is a representation of most friend groups above the age of 13, every group has a story to tell, this story is an eye opener in more ways than i can comprehend, its now my belief that everyone needs a Bea, Angus, Gregg or even Mae in their lives (shout out to all my Germs out there) if you havent played this game or seen a playthrough i think your missing out, everything is so well written and well described, i see a bit of myself in every character, even the bad guys, at the end of the day, everyone has something going on, good bad or funny, and this game shows that beautifully
comment3: ♥♥♥♥♥♥♥. Now that i come back to this years later in the same position as the characters. Yeah it hits harder. That feeling of aimlessness, youth, feeling too old to be this young. Play this game if you're in your early 20s and feeling like you don't have a ♥♥♥♥♥♥♥ clue what you're doing in life
